Spells-All — Female Half-Elf Wizard: 10
Strength: 15 (+2) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 10 (+0) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Criminal Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: Celtic-Belenus (NG)
Ability Boosts: Constitution; Strength Experience: 68272/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 225/450
Ability Notes:
Half-Elf Ability Adjustment: +2 Charisma/Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Ability Boosts: 2 to distribute
Bladesong: +10 Speed during Bladesong
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2 Selectable Feature Count: Wizard (Arcane Tradition)
Feats: Charger; Sentinel Half-Elf Features: Darkvision; Fey Ancestry; Half-Elf Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Elvish; Choose 1 from any); Skill Versatility Wizard Features: Arcane Recovery; Arcane Tradition; Bladesinging; Bladesong; Cantrip Formulas; Extra Attack; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Religion); Song Of Defense; Spellcasting (Wizard); Training In War And Song; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling) Criminal Features: Criminal Contact; Skill Proficiency (Deception; Stealth); Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools; Choose 1 from any Gaming Set)
Feature Notes:
Arcane Tradition: 1 selection
Bladesong: Can use a bonus action to gain Bladesong benefits for 1 min 4 times per long rest; wearing medium or heavy armor, using a shield, or attacking two-handed negates
Criminal Contact: Knows how to contact a liaison to criminal networks
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +0 Insight: (wis) +1 Performance: (cha) +6
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +6 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +5
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Deception; Performance; Religion; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Dice Set; Thieves' Tools
Languages: Common; Elvish; Infernal
Skill Notes:
Skill Versatility: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)
Training In War And Song: Skill Proficiency (Performance)
Bladesong: Has advantage on Acrobatics during Bladesong
Combat
Hit Points: 42 Initiative: +0 Armor Class: 11
Armor Proficiency: Light Weapon Proficiency: Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Longsword; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+6 1d4+2 P R20/60); Dart (+6 1d4+2 P R20/60); Light Crossbow (+4 1d8 P R80/320); Unarmed Strike (+6 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Training In War And Song: Armor Proficiency (Light)/Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any One-Handed)
Bladesong: +3 Armor Class during Bladesong
Charger: Can use a bonus action after a 10' Dash to attack, inflicting +5 damage or a 10' push
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Sentinel: Successful opportunity attacks halt the target/Can make an opportunity attack when a foe uses Disengage and use a reaction to attack when an adjacent foe attacks another
Song Of Defense: Can use a reaction and expend a spell slot during Bladesong to reduce damage to self by 5x the slot level
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +0; Intelligence: +7; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +5
Save Notes:
Bladesong: +3 Constitution to retain spell concentration during Bladesong
Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charm and immunity to magical sleep
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: W0: 5; W: 13 Spell Slots: W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 3; W5: 2 Attack: W: +7 Spell DC: W: 15
Spells:
Blade Of Disaster (W9 Conj): (Bonus) R60' Creates a rift blade that attacks twice, inflicting 4d12 HP force x3@18; can use a bonus action each turn to move it 30' and attack twice for concentration up to 1 min
Booming Blade (W0 Evoc): (Action) R5' Struck foe suffers 2d8 HP thunder on its next move before the start of the next turn
Dream Of The Blue Veil (W7 Conj): (10 Minutes) R20' Self and 8 willing targets view another world for 6 hr, then teleport to it
Green-Flame Blade (W0 Evoc): (Action) R5' Foe struck with a melee weapon suffers normal damage +1d8 HP fire, and an adjacent target suffers 1d8+3 HP fire
Intellect Fortress (W3 Abju): (Action) R30' Willing target gains resistance to psychic damage and advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saves for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Lightning Lure (W0 Evoc): (Action) R15' Pulls the target 10' and inflicts 2d8 HP lightning if this brings it to within 5' (save Strength negates)
Mind Sliver (W0 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 2d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save before the end of the next turn (save Intelligence negates)
Spirit Shroud (W3 Necr): (Bonus) Self hits within 10' inflict +1d8 HP of a choice of radiant, necrotic, or cold, and 1 target per rd suffers -10 Speed until the start of the next turn, for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP per 2 levels)
Summon Aberration (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient aberrant spirit (Armor Class 15; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type beholderkin (R150' inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic; fly 30'), slaad (inflicts 1d10+7 HP slashing and negates healing for 1 rd; regenerates 5 hit points per rd), or star spawn (inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic, plus 2d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) in a 5' radius) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Beast (R2 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient bestial spirit (Armor Class 13; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d8+6 piercing) of air (20 hit points; fly 60'; does not provoke opportunity attacks when flying out of reach), land (30 hit points; move and climb 30'; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally), or water (30 hit points; swim 30'; water-breathing; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 5, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Celestial (C5 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient celestial spirit (40 hit points; move 30' and fly 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; touch restores 2d8+5 hit points once per day) of type avenger (Armor Class 16; R150' inflicts 2d6+7 HP radiant) or defender (Armor Class 18; inflicts 1d10+8 HP radiant and gives 1d10 temporary hit points to a creature within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, attack damage by 1, and healing by 1)
Summon Construct (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient construct spirit (Armor Class 17; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d8+8 bludgeoning) of clay (attacks an adjacent creature or moves 15' as a reaction to damage), metal (inflicts 1d10 HP fire on adjacent melee attackers), or stone (can inflict half Speed and loss of reactions (save Wisdom negates) on creatures within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Elemental (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient elemental spirit (Armor Class 15; 50 hit points; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d10+8 HP) of air (fly 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts bludgeoning), earth (burrow 40'; slam inflicts bludgeoning), fire (can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts fire), or water (swim 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts bludgeoning) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Fey (W3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40' and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; short sword inflicts 1d6+6 HP piercing plus 1d6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 5' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and piercing damage by 1)
Summon Fiend (W6 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fiendish spirit (Armor Class 18; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type demon (50 hit points; climb 40'; bite inflicts 1d12+9 HP necrotic; death or end of spell inflicts 2d10+6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 10' radius), devil (40 hit points; fly 60'; can see in magical darkness; R150' flame inflicts 2d6+9 fire) or yugoloth (60 hit points; claws inflict 1d8+9 slashing and allow teleporting 30' afterward) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and damage by 1)
Summon Shadowspawn (W3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient shadow spirit (Armor Class 14; 35 hit points; move 40'; 120' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d12+6 cold; R30' scream inflicts frightened (save Wisdom ends) once per day) of type fury (has advantage when attacking frightened foes), despair (R5' inflicts -20 Speed), or fear (uses a bonus action to hide in dim light or darkness) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Undead (W3 Necr): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient undead spirit (Armor Class 14; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type ghostly (30 hit points; fly 40'; moves through creatures and objects; inflicts 1d8+6 HP necrotic and frightened until the end of the target's next turn (save Wisdom HP only)), putrid (30 hit points; 5' radius inflicts poisoned until the start of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates); claws inflict 1d6+6 slashing, plus paralysis on a poisoned target until the end of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates)), or skeletal (20 hit points; R150' inflicts 2d4+6 HP necrotic) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Sword Burst (W0 Conj): (Action) 5' radius inflicts 2d6 HP force (save Dexterity negates)
Tasha's Caustic Brew (W1 Evoc): (Action) 30'x5' line inflicts 2d4 HP acid on each of its turns for concentration up to 1 min (save Dexterity negates; removing the acid ends) (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Tasha's Mind Whip (W2 Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic, loss of reactions, and only 1 choice of a move, action, or bonus action on the target's next turn (save Intelligence half HP only) (+Level affects +1 target)
Tasha's Otherworldly Guise (W6 Tran): (Bonus) Self gains immunity either to fire, poison, and the poisoned condition or to radiant, necrotic, and the charmed condition, a 40' fly Speed, +2 Armor Class, and 2 magical weapon attacks each turn using the spell attack modifier in place of Strength or Dexterity, for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 5 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Cantrip Formulas: Can replace a W0 cantrip once per long rest
Spellcasting (Wizard): Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
